goal: Make /init safe for existing projects and fix the unknown stack fallback

tasks.name: Add safety check before replacing root CLAUDE.md
tasks.action: Replace unconditional cp with a diff check against CLAUDE-generic.md. If CLAUDE.md has custom content, ask before overwriting. If it matches the generic template, replace silently.

tasks.name: Fix unknown stack fallback
tasks.action: Change TEMPLATE="CLAUDE.md" to TEMPLATE="docs/templates/CLAUDE-generic.md" in the unknown stack case.

commitMessage: fix(install-template-sync): make /init safe for existing projects
